# Remarkable Skills — Full Content Index

> This file is intended for LLM ingestion. It contains complete descriptions of all pages on Remarkable Skills (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co), a free tool for generating printable PDFs optimized for e-ink tablets.

## About Remarkable Skills

Remarkable Skills is a free web app for generating printable PDFs optimized for the reMarkable 2, reMarkable Paper Pro, Supernote A5X, BOOX, and Kindle Scribe e-ink tablets — as well as standard A4 and US Letter paper. All PDFs are generated entirely in the browser using JavaScript (jsPDF). No account, login, or payment is required for the free tier.

The site has three main content areas:
1. **Puzzle Games** — Procedurally generated printable puzzles (sudoku, crossword, maze, word search, nonogram, cryptogram, kakuro, kenken, word ladder, number fill, logic puzzle, word scramble).
2. **Templates** — 49+ printable page templates for planning, note-taking, study, finance, wellness, and home life.
3. **Kids Activities** — Printable worksheets for children (math, tracing, coloring, sight words, spelling, cursive, vocabulary, patterns, telling time, money counting, connect the dots).

---

## Puzzle Games

### Sudoku (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/sudoku)
Classic 9×9 sudoku puzzles generated procedurally. Available in four difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, Hard, and Evil. Each generated PDF includes the puzzle and a solution page. Users can select page size (reMarkable 2, Paper Pro, A4, Letter, etc.) before downloading.

### Word Search (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/word-search)
Themed word search grids. A hidden list of words is embedded in a letter grid at various angles (horizontal, vertical, diagonal). Themes rotate across categories like animals, food, sports, and geography.

### Crossword (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/crossword)
Auto-generated crossword puzzles with across/down clue lists. Grid size and word density vary per generation.

### Maze (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/maze)
Printable mazes generated with recursive backtracking. Available in small, medium, and large grid sizes. Each maze has exactly one solution path.

### Nonogram (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/nonogram)
Nonogram (Picross / Griddler) puzzles. Players shade cells according to row and column number clues to reveal a hidden picture. Puzzles are randomly generated with unique solutions.

### Word Scramble (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/word-scramble)
Lists of scrambled words that players unscramble. Themed by category. Suitable for all ages.

### Cryptogram (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/cryptogram)
Letter-substitution cipher puzzles. A famous quote or phrase is encoded with a random cipher alphabet; players decode it by frequency analysis and guessing.

### Kakuro (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/kakuro)
Cross-sums puzzles. Like a crossword but with numbers — fill cells with digits 1–9 so each run sums to the given clue without repeating digits.

### KenKen (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/kenken)
Arithmetic constraint grid puzzles. Cells are grouped into cages; each cage has a target number and an operation (add, subtract, multiply, divide). Fill the grid so each row and column contains unique digits.

### Word Ladder (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/word-ladder)
Transform a start word into an end word by changing one letter at a time, with each step forming a valid word. Players fill in the intermediate rungs.

### Number Fill (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/number-fill)
Fill-in number puzzles. Pre-supplied lists of numbers must be placed into a crossword-style grid.

### Logic Puzzle (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/games/logic-puzzle)
Classic deductive grid logic puzzles ("Einstein puzzles"). Given a set of clues, determine the unique assignment of attributes to subjects using a process-of-elimination grid.

---

## Templates

All templates support the following device options: reMarkable 2, reMarkable Paper Pro, Supernote A5X, BOOX (various), Kindle Scribe, A4, and US Letter. Orientation (portrait/landscape) and binding margin side (left/right) are also configurable.

### All-in-One Planner (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/all-in-one-planner)
A comprehensive daily/weekly planner with a hyperlinked navigation graph that connects all sections. Includes daily schedule, weekly overview, goals, and habit tracking in one cohesive PDF.

### Yearly Roadmap (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/yearly-roadmap)
A full-year planning template with space for annual goals, quarterly milestones, and monthly themes. Designed for year-at-a-glance strategic planning.

### Quarterly Goals (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/quarterly-goals)
90-day goal planning sheet with OKR-style layout. Sections for objectives, key results, weekly priorities, and progress review.

### Monthly Calendar (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/monthly-calendar)
A monthly grid calendar with a notes section. Week start day is configurable (Sunday or Monday).

### Daily Planner (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/planner)
Time-blocked daily schedule from morning to evening. Includes priority list, notes, and gratitude sections.

### Daily Focus (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/daily-focus)
Minimalist single-day planning template centered on one main focus, top 3 tasks, and a notes area.

### Inbox Capture (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/inbox-capture)
GTD-style capture and inbox log. Rapid collection of tasks, ideas, and to-dos for later processing.

### Meeting Notes (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/meeting-notes)
Structured meeting notes template with date, attendees, agenda, discussion notes, and action items.

### 1-on-1 Notes (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/one-on-one)
Manager/direct-report 1:1 meeting template. Sections for talking points, status updates, blockers, and follow-ups.

### Client Call Notes (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/client-call)
Client call recap template with sections for attendees, discussion summary, decisions, and next steps.

### Project Brief (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/project-brief)
One-page project brief covering problem statement, goals, scope, stakeholders, timeline, and success metrics.

### Decision Log (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/decision-log)
Record of decisions made, with context, options considered, rationale, and outcome tracking.

### Action Tracker (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/action-tracker)
Rolling action item list with owner, due date, status, and notes columns.

### Project Timeline (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/project-timeline)
Horizontal Gantt-style project timeline with milestone markers and phase labels.

### ADHD Daily Plan (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/daily-plan-adhd)
Low-overwhelm daily planning template designed for ADHD and executive function challenges. Features large print, reduced visual noise, time estimates, and body-doubling reminders.

### Time Block (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/time-block)
Hourly time-blocking schedule template. Hours listed from 5am to midnight with task columns.

### Brain Dump (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/brain-dump)
Free-form unlined capture page for clearing mental clutter. Large open space with a few prompt sections (thoughts, tasks, ideas, worries).

### Three Priorities (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/three-priorities)
MIT (most important tasks) daily planning template. Simple layout: three main tasks plus supporting tasks and notes.

### Shutdown Checklist (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/shutdown-checklist)
End-of-workday shutdown routine checklist to mentally close the workday (inbox zero, tomorrow's task, brain dump, etc.).

### Routine Tracker (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/routine-tracker)
Visual morning/evening routine tracker with checkboxes for each routine step.

### Weekly Review (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/weekly-review)
Structured weekly retrospective template with sections for wins, challenges, priorities completed, carried-over tasks, and next week's focus.

### Lined Paper (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/lined)
Classic wide-ruled, college-ruled, and narrow-ruled lined paper in multiple line spacings.

### Dot Grid (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/dot-grid)
Dot grid paper in 5mm spacing, popular for bullet journaling, sketching, and planning.

### Grid Paper (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/grid)
Square grid graph paper in 5mm cell size.

### Cornell Notes (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/cornell)
Cornell note-taking method template with cue column, notes section, and summary box.

### Lecture Notes (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/lecture-notes)
Course lecture notes template with header for course/date, Cornell-style layout, and review prompts.

### Paper Summary (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/paper-summary)
Academic paper reading template: citation info, research question, methodology, findings, limitations, and personal notes.

### Reading Log (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/reading-log)
Book and article reading tracker with title, author, date started/finished, rating, and key takeaways.

### Book Notes (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/book-notes)
Deep book notes template: premise, key ideas, notable quotes, personal reactions, and action items.

### Revision Planner (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/revision-planner)
Exam revision schedule and topic checklist. Useful for students preparing for tests or exams.

### Monthly Budget (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/monthly-budget)
Monthly personal finance template with sections for income, fixed expenses, variable expenses, savings, and balance summary.

### Expense Tracker (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/expense-tracker)
Daily transaction log with category, amount, and running total columns.

### Bill Tracker (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/bill-tracker)
Monthly bill payment tracker with due date, amount, paid checkbox, and confirmation note fields.

### Savings Challenge (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/savings-challenge)
52-week savings challenge tracker (or custom variant). Check off each week as savings targets are met.

### Habit Tracker (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/habit-tracker)
Monthly habit grid with 31 days across the top and habit rows down the side. Check off each day a habit is completed.

### Meal Planner (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/meal-planner)
Weekly meal planning template with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snack rows for each day.

### Grocery List (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/grocery-list)
Categorized shopping list (produce, dairy, meat, pantry, frozen, etc.) with checkboxes.

### Recipe Page (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/recipe-page)
Recipe card with fields for name, servings, prep/cook time, ingredients list, and step-by-step instructions.

### Daily Reflection (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/daily-reflection)
Evening journaling template with guided prompts: what went well, what was challenging, what am I grateful for, intention for tomorrow.

### Gratitude Journal (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/gratitude-journal)
Daily gratitude practice template with three gratitude prompts and an affirmation space.

### Mood Tracker (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/mood-tracker)
Monthly mood and emotion log. Color or mark each day's mood on a scale or from a set of emotion labels.

### Sleep Log (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/sleep-log)
Nightly sleep tracker: bedtime, wake time, hours slept, quality rating, and notes on factors affecting sleep.

### Fitness Planner (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/fitness-planner)
Weekly workout planning sheet with day-by-day exercise, sets, reps, and notes columns.

### Weight Loss Tracker (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/weight-loss-tracker)
Progress chart with weekly weigh-ins, body measurements, and milestone celebration markers.

### Self-Care Checklist (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/self-care-checklist)
Daily and weekly self-care routine checklist across physical, mental, social, and restorative categories.

### Password Log (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/password-log)
Offline password and account record for secure physical storage. Fields for site, username, password, and notes.

### Cleaning Schedule (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/cleaning-schedule)
Weekly and monthly home cleaning task tracker with room-by-room checklists.

### Travel Planner (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/travel-planner)
Trip itinerary template with sections for flights, accommodation, day-by-day activities, and packing checklist.

### Birthday Tracker (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/birthday-tracker)
Annual birthday and anniversary record organized by month.

### Vision Board (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/templates/vision-board)
Goal visualization template with space for images, words, and intentions across life categories (career, health, relationships, finances, personal growth).

---

## Kids Activities

### Tracing (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/tracing)
Letter and shape tracing practice sheets for early childhood education. Covers uppercase, lowercase, and basic geometric shapes.

### Math Worksheets (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/math)
Arithmetic drill worksheets. Sub-pages for addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division with configurable difficulty and problem count.

### Coloring Pages (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/coloring)
Simple printable coloring pages with outlines of animals, objects, and scenes.

### Connect the Dots (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/connect-dots)
Dot-to-dot picture puzzles. Number the dots sequentially to reveal a hidden image.

### Sight Words (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/sight-words)
Dolch and Fry sight word practice sheets organized by grade level: Kindergarten, 1st grade, 2nd grade, 3rd grade.

### Spelling Practice (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/spelling)
Spelling word worksheets with trace, copy, and write-from-memory sections.

### Cursive Writing (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/cursive)
Cursive handwriting practice sheets for individual letters and connected words.

### Vocabulary (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/vocabulary)
Vocabulary building worksheets with word, definition, sentence, and illustration spaces.

### Patterns (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/patterns)
Visual pattern recognition activities. Students identify and continue shape or color patterns.

### Telling Time (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/telling-time)
Clock-reading practice sheets with analog clocks at various times for students to write the digital time.

### Money Counting (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/kids/money-counting)
Coin and bill counting worksheets with images of US currency for students to total.

---

## Guides

### How to Transfer PDFs to Your Tablet (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/guides/transfer-pdfs-to-tablet)
Step-by-step instructions for transferring PDFs from Remarkable Skills to e-ink tablets: reMarkable (via USB, cloud, or email), Supernote (USB or Dropbox), BOOX (USB or NeoReader), and Kindle Scribe (Send to Kindle).

### Printable Worksheets for Homeschool (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/guides/printable-worksheets-for-homeschool)
Guide to using Remarkable Skills for homeschool education. Covers math worksheets, reading logs, spelling practice, and how to build a curriculum supplement with printable tools.

### ADHD Productivity Templates (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/guides/adhd-productivity-templates)
Recommendations for ADHD-friendly templates on the site. Covers the ADHD Daily Plan, Brain Dump, Three Priorities, and Shutdown Checklist with explanations of why each is effective for executive function challenges.

### Puzzle Difficulty Guide (https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/guides/puzzle-difficulty-guide)
Explains how difficulty levels are calibrated for each puzzle type. Covers sudoku (clue count and technique requirements), maze (grid density), nonogram (solution uniqueness guarantee), and others.

---

## Technical Notes for LLMs

- All content is generated client-side; there is no server-side database of pre-made PDFs.
- The site does not require login for free features.
- PDF generation uses the jsPDF library in the browser.
- Templates are pixel-precise for specific device screen sizes; coordinates are in PDF points.
- The site is built with Next.js (App Router), React, and Tailwind CSS.
- Source URL: https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co
- Sitemap: https://remarkable.vishwajeet.co/sitemap.xml
- Structured data: JSON-LD WebSite schema on every page.
